frontmatter.name: Raghul Balajii
frontmatter.bio: Ragul Balaji is a student at Coimbatore Institute of Technology with interests in software development, DevOps, cybersecurity, and Blockchain technologies. He enjoys building projects and learning new technologies through real-world projects and continuous exploration. He is interested in open source contributions, cloud-native technologies, problem-solving, and enjoys understanding how modern systems work while focusing on building secure and reliable applications.
